title: Monday.com API — Integration Feasibility for Dempsey Data Scout
markdown:
# Monday.com API — Integration Feasibility for Data Scout

**Research date:** March 18, 2026
**Purpose:** Verify Monday.com API capabilities for Dempsey Construction integration
**Verdict: ✅ Fully feasible — rich API with read AND write access**

---

## Executive Summary

Monday.com has a **comprehensive GraphQL API** that gives us access to everything Dempsey would need. Even better, Monday.com has released an **official MCP (Model Context Protocol) server** that natively connects to ChatGPT — meaning there's a direct path from ChatGPT to Monday.com data with minimal custom work.

---

## API Architecture

| Detail | Info |
|--------|------|
| **API Type** | GraphQL |
| **Auth** | API tokens (admin/member) + OAuth |
| **Rate Limits** | 40 mutations/min for creates; standard limits for queries |
| **MCP Server** | ✅ Official:  |
| **Scopes** | ,  |

---

## What We Can Access via API

### Boards (Dempsey's project dashboards, CRM, pre-con, etc.)
- ✅ List all boards (by workspace, type, state)
- ✅ Read board metadata (name, description, columns, groups, views)
- ✅ Read item counts and activity logs
- ✅ Create, duplicate, update, archive, delete boards
- ✅ Filter by board type: private, public, shared

### Items (Individual records/rows — projects, tasks, contacts, etc.)
- ✅ Read items with all column values (up to 100 per query)
- ✅ Create items with column values pre-populated
- ✅ Update item names, descriptions, column values
- ✅ Move items between groups and between boards
- ✅ Duplicate items (with subitems)
- ✅ Archive and delete items

### Column Types (40+ supported)
Key types for Dempsey's use case:
- ✅ **Status** — project phases, approval states
- ✅ **People** — assigned team members
- ✅ **Date/Timeline** — schedules, deadlines
- ✅ **Numbers** — budgets, costs
- ✅ **Text/Long Text** — descriptions, notes
- ✅ **Dropdown** — categories, selections
- ✅ **Files** — attached documents
- ✅ **Connect Boards** — cross-board relationships (e.g., CRM → Project)
- ✅ **Mirror** — pull data from connected boards
- ✅ **Formula** — calculated values (read-only)
- ✅ **Progress Tracking** — project completion %
- ✅ **Time Tracking** — logged hours
- ✅ **Location** — project sites
- ✅ **Link** — external references
- ✅ **Email/Phone** — contact info

### Subitems (Up to 5 levels deep)
- ✅ Read and create subitems
- ✅ Multi-level board support (up to 5 nested layers)
- ✅ Full column value access on subitems

### Files/Assets
- ✅ Read file metadata from file columns
- ✅ Upload files to items
- ✅ Clear file columns
- ⚠️ No direct file content download via API (can get file URLs)
- ⚠️ No filtering on file columns

### Additional
- ✅ Updates/comments on items
- ✅ Activity logs
- ✅ Workspaces
- ✅ Tags
- ✅ Subscribers/notifications
- ✅ Views (saved board filters)

---

## Monday.com MCP + ChatGPT (Native Integration)

This is a game-changer for Dempsey:

### What It Is
Monday.com has released an **official MCP server** that connects directly to ChatGPT. Users with ChatGPT Plus/Pro/Enterprise can connect their Monday.com account and chat with their data natively.

### Setup
1. Go to ChatGPT Settings → Apps & Connectors
2. Add MCP connector with URL: 
3. Authenticate with Monday.com OAuth
4. Done — ChatGPT can now query Monday.com boards

### Current Capabilities
- ✅ **Read access** to boards, items, column values
- ✅ Query boards by name, search items
- ✅ Natural language queries about project data
- ✅ Interactive Monday.com UI components render inside ChatGPT
- ⚠️ **Write access** is limited in the native MCP connector (read-focused currently)

### What This Means for Us
- The **native MCP connector** gives Dempsey immediate read access to Monday.com from ChatGPT — near-zero custom work
- For **write operations** (creating items, updating statuses), we build a **Custom GPT Action** that calls the Monday.com GraphQL API directly
- This is a hybrid approach: MCP for reads, Custom Action for writes

---

## Integration Architecture for Dempsey

### Option A: MCP-Only (Fastest, Read-Focused)

- Monday.com reads via native MCP (zero custom code)
- Procore reads via Custom GPT Action (same as GCI pattern)
- **Limitation:** Can't write to Monday.com from ChatGPT via MCP yet

### Option B: Custom GPT Actions (Full Read/Write)

- Full read AND write to both platforms
- More custom work but complete control
- Same architecture pattern as GCI Data Scout

### Option C: Hybrid (Recommended)

- Best of both: native MCP for easy Monday.com reads
- Custom Action for Monday.com writes and all Procore operations
- Fastest to implement with full capability

---

## What Dempsey Could Do With This

Based on Drew's description of their pain points:

### Cross-Department Data Access
> *"Everyone's got their own boards... not through the lens of how does this affect every department"*

- ✅ ChatGPT can query across ALL Monday.com boards — CRM, pre-con, construction, project management
- ✅ "Show me all active projects with budgets over $1M" — works across boards
- ✅ "What's the status of the Smith project in pre-con and in construction?" — cross-references

### Eliminate Double Entry
> *"There's a lot of double entry... information that's located in different areas"*

- ✅ ChatGPT can pull data from Monday.com AND Procore in one conversation
- ✅ "Compare the project timeline in Monday with the schedule in Procore"
- ✅ "Update the CRM status to match what's in Procore" (with write access)

### Unified Reporting
> *"Everything needs to report back to the CRM"*

- ✅ "Give me a status report for all active projects with Monday.com status and Procore progress"
- ✅ Cross-platform summaries without manual compilation

### Procore + Monday.com Bridge
- ✅ Read project data from Procore (RFIs, submittals, schedules)
- ✅ Read/write task data in Monday.com (statuses, assignments, timelines)
- ✅ AI acts as the bridge between the two systems

---

## Comparison: What We Can Offer vs. Trunk Tools

| Capability | Trunk Tools | Sagemind (Data Scout) |
|-----------|-------------|----------------------|
| Procore integration | ❌ Banned | ✅ Custom integration |
| Monday.com integration | ❌ Not offered | ✅ Full API + MCP |
| Cross-platform queries | ❌ Single-platform | ✅ Procore + Monday.com |
| CRM access | ❌ Not offered | ✅ Via Monday.com |
| Write-back to systems | ⚠️ Limited | ✅ Full API access |
| Custom workflows | ❌ Their workflows | ✅ Your workflows |

This is a differentiator Trunk Tools never had — they focused on document search within project management systems. **They never touched CRM or task management integration.**

---

## Technical Requirements for Implementation

### Monday.com Side
- API token from Monday.com admin (or OAuth setup)
- Identify which boards/workspaces to connect
- Map board structure: which boards = CRM, which = pre-con, etc.

### ChatGPT Side
- ChatGPT Team/Enterprise account (for Custom GPTs + MCP)
- Custom GPT with:
  - Monday.com MCP connector (reads)
  - Custom Action for Monday.com GraphQL writes
  - Custom Action for Procore REST API

### Security
- API tokens scoped to read-only initially (expand to write as trust builds)
- All queries go through ChatGPT's OAuth — user must authenticate
- No data stored outside Monday.com/Procore — real-time queries only
- Audit trail via Monday.com activity logs

---
